ecarx.carext.userprofile

Annotation Type IUserProfile.ProfileLoginType


  • @Retention(value=SOURCE)
public static @interface IUserProfile.ProfileLoginType
    Profile login type
    IUserProfile.LOGIN_TYPE_UNKNOWN
    IUserProfile.LOGIN_TYPE_USER_ACC
    IUserProfile.LOGIN_TYPE_FINGERPRINT
    IUserProfile.LOGIN_TYPE_FACEID
    IUserProfile.LOGIN_TYPE_VOICE
    IUserProfile.LOGIN_TYPE_CARKEY
    IUserProfile.LOGIN_TYPE_DIGITALKEY
